prompt_template: Investigate two questions in parallel — emit a [PARALLEL:researcher,researcher] directive with one task per researcher: (a) {question_a}, (b) {question_b}. Then synthesize the answers. Output the synthesis. Do not modify any files.
notes: Specifically tests the parallel orchestration path. If parallel breaks, this seed should regress noisily. Capture parallel_group_count to confirm fan-out actually happened.
